description: Core shared library for the AutoService AI customer-service and sales bot framework, providing config, database, session, permission, plugin loading, CRM, API client, and utility functions.

key_symbols.name: __all__
key_symbols.description: Public API export list consolidating symbols from all submodules

key_symbols.name: APIClient
key_symbols.description: HTTP client for AutoService API calls; reads mock server info or uses a provided base URL; convenience methods for customer, subscription, billing, order, pricing, feature, service, permission, refund, and subscription-change queries

key_symbols.description: Initialize with domain, optional base_url override, and timeout

key_symbols.description: Resolve base URL from .mock_server_info file or default to localhost:8100

key_symbols.description: Execute GET request with optional query params

key_symbols.name: APIClient.post
key_symbols.description: Execute POST request with JSON body

key_symbols.name: APIClient.put
key_symbols.description: Execute PUT request with JSON body

key_symbols.name: APIClient.query_customer
key_symbols.description: GET /api/v1/customers/{identifier}

key_symbols.name: APIClient.query_feature

key_symbols.name: APIClient.query_services
key_symbols.description: GET available services by category

key_symbols.name: APIClient.check_permission
key_symbols.description: POST permission check for an action on a product

key_symbols.name: APIClient.request_refund
key_symbols.description: POST refund request

key_symbols.name: APIClient.change_subscription
key_symbols.description: PUT subscription change (cancel, upgrade, etc.)

key_symbols.name: APIClient.health_check
key_symbols.description: GET /health endpoint

key_symbols.name: format_api_response
key_symbols.description: Format API response dict for conversation display, supports zh/en languages

key_symbols.name: format_permission_response
key_symbols.description: Format permission check response for conversation display, supports zh/en

key_symbols.name: APIResponse
key_symbols.description: Standardized API response container with success, data, endpoint, is_mock fields and display formatting

key_symbols.name: APIResponse.to_display_block

key_symbols.name: APIInterface

key_symbols.description: Create APIInterface from a dictionary

key_symbols.name: APIQueryEngine
key_symbols.description: Engine for executing API queries; builds prompts for mock data generation or executes real HTTP requests

key_symbols.description: Initialize with mode (mock/real/hybrid) and optional base_url

key_symbols.description: Build a Chinese-language prompt for Claude to generate mock API response data

key_symbols.name: APIQueryEngine.format_mock_response
key_symbols.description: Wrap mock data into a standardized APIResponse object

key_symbols.name: COMMON_INTERFACES
key_symbols.description: Dict of 5 common API interface templates: user_info, subscription_check, billing_history, purchase_history, service_list

key_symbols.name: get_interface
key_symbols.description: Get API interface by name; checks product-specific interfaces first, then falls back to COMMON_INTERFACES

interfaces.name: get_domain_config(domain: str, config_path: Optional[Path], language: Optional[str]) -> dict
save_record(domain: str, record_type: str, data: dict, config: Optional[dict]) -> Path
list_records(domain: str, item_type: str, verbose: bool, config: Optional[dict]) -> dict
get_record(domain: str, record_type: str, name_or_id: str, config: Optional[dict]) -> tuple
update_record(domain: str, record_type: str, name_or_id: str, updates: dict, config: Optional[dict]) -> Optional[Path]
delete_record(domain: str, record_type: str, name_or_id: str, config: Optional[dict]) -> bool
print_results(results: dict, config: Optional[dict], verbose: bool)
get_output_dir(domain: str, item_type: str, config: Optional[dict]) -> Path
import_file(file_path: str, output_dir: str, item_type: str) -> list[Path]
import_to_domain(domain: str, file_path: str, item_type: str, config: Optional[dict]) -> list[Path]
save_session(domain, session_id, product, customer, operator, conversation, review, config) -> Path
generate_session_id(domain: str, claude_session_id: Optional[str], config: Optional[dict]) -> str
init_session(domain: str, config: Optional[dict]) -> tuple[str, Path]
check_permission(action: str, product_permissions: Optional[dict], domain: str) -> PermissionCheck
format_api_response(response: dict, endpoint: str, language: str) -> str
upsert_contact(open_id, name, phone, email, company, department, job_title) -> dict
log_message(open_id, chat_id, direction, text, ts) -> None
add_rule(scope, rule, scope_value, context, created_by) -> dict

dependencies: yaml / PyYAML (third-party, optional in config.py, required in plugin_loader.py and rules.py)

test_results.command: no tests for this module specifically

user_flows.name: Plugin discovery and loading
steps: discover() scans plugins/ directory for subdirectories with plugin.yaml
load_plugin() parses plugin.yaml, resolves handler references to callables
If mode=mock, initializes MockDB and seeds with JSON data
Returns list of Plugin objects with tools (MCP) and routes (HTTP) ready for registration

user_flows.name: Record CRUD (file-based database)
steps: get_domain_config() resolves domain to database_path
save_record() creates directory with info.json + README.md
list_records() scans directories, reads info.json
get_record() finds by name/ID, update_record() modifies in-place, delete_record() removes directory

user_flows.name: Customer cold-start flow
steps: CustomerManager.get_or_create() is called with phone/ID/name
Attempts lookup_by_id, lookup_by_phone, lookup_by_name
If not found and phone provided, create_cold_start_customer() creates minimal record
After call, update_customer() enriches record with collected info and session history

user_flows.name: Session lifecycle
steps: init_session() detects Claude session ID and creates session directory
generate_session_id() produces formatted ID: {prefix}_{date}_{seq}_{claude_id}
Conversation proceeds (external to this module)
save_session() persists conversation + review as session.json + README.md

user_flows.name: Permission check flow
steps: check_permission() accepts action string and optional product permissions
Loads OperatorPermissions from product data or gets domain defaults
Checks action against forbidden, requires_process, requires_supervisor, can_approve rules in priority order
Returns PermissionCheck with level, allowed flag, reason, and optional workflow

user_flows.name: CRM contact tracking (Feishu)
steps: upsert_contact() creates/updates contact record on first message
increment_message_count() bumps counter on each message
log_message() records each inbound/outbound message
get_rules_for_customer() retrieves applicable behavior rules

user_flows.name: Mock API serving
steps: MockDB is initialized with db_path, creates 9-table schema
Plugin loader seeds MockDB from JSON seed data
APIClient reads .mock_server_info for URL, issues HTTP requests
MockDB provides CRUD for customers, products, subscriptions, billing, orders, services, pricing, features, permissions

user_flows.name: Data import from files
steps: import_file() or import_to_domain() called with file path and type
Dispatches to extract_from_docx/xlsx/pdf based on file extension
Each extractor parses key:value pairs or tabular data into list of dicts
save_item() persists each item as info.json + README.md in its own directory

user_flows.name: Claude Agent SDK integration
steps: query() is called with a prompt string
Configures ClaudeAgentOptions with .autoservice/.claude plugin path and proxy env
Delegates to claude_agent_sdk.query() and yields raw message objects
